Classic Sandwich Bread

PJ Hamel 1 loaf, 16 slices
  • 2 1/2 cups (300g) King Arthur Unbleached All-Purpose Flour
  • 1 cup (113g) King Arthur White Whole Wheat Flour
  • 2 teaspoons instant yeast
  • 1 1/4 teaspoons (8g) salt
  • 2 tablespoons (25g) sugar
  • 4 tablespoons (57g) butter, softened
  • 1 cup (227g) milk, lukewarm
  1. Weigh your flour, then combine all of the ingredients in a large bowl.
  2. Mix and knead until you have a smooth, soft dough.
  3. Cover the dough and let it rise until doubled, 60 to 90 minutes.
  4. Shape into an 8-inch log and place in a greased loaf pan; let rise 60 minutes.
  5. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 30 to 35 minutes, until golden brown.
